account.profile_upload.body: The profiles on this device — payment methods, settings, and tip history — can move into your account and sync to every device you sign in on. This device's local copies are replaced by the synced ones.
account.profile_upload.done: Your profiles now live in your account.
account.profile_upload.failed: Couldn't finish the move — it will resume on the next launch.
account.profile_upload.title: Move your profiles to this account?
enum.perm_why.charges: See in-person tips you tap on a card reader or phone.
enum.perm_why.checkout_sessions: See incoming tips — history and details.
enum.perm_why.events: Live feed: poll for new tips during a session.
enum.perm_why.payment_links: Create and manage your tip link.
enum.perm_why.prices: Create the pay-what-you-want price for tips.
enum.perm_why.products: Create the "Tips" product behind the link.
history.demo_no_stripe:
Demo mode has no Stripe history.
Connect your account to see every tip you've ever received.
history.demo_no_stripe_inline: Demo mode has no Stripe history. Connect your account to see every tip you've ever received.
history.relay_empty: Tips from {method} will appear here after your next live session.
history.relay_note: Recorded on this device when tips reach your live screen — not confirmed payments.
history.relay_only_below: Your Revolut, MobilePay & Monzo tips are in the table below. Connect a Stripe account to take card tips too.
history.relay_only_tabs: Your Revolut, MobilePay & Monzo tips are in their own tabs. Connect a Stripe account to take card tips too.
history.sessions_empty: No sessions yet — hit “Go live” before the first song!
history.tips_empty: No tips yet — they'll all show up here.
history.title: History
home.already_live: A live session is already running in {band} — join it from the banner above.
home.demo_mode: Demo mode — start a session to watch pretend fans shower you with tips.
home.discard.body: Started {when}{summary}. This can't be undone — it won't be saved to your history.
home.discard.title: Discard this session?
home.fans_pick_methods: Fans pick Stripe, Revolut, MobilePay or Monzo on your tip page.
home.no_tips_yet: No tips yet. Put that QR code where people can see it! 🎯
home.reprint.body: Your old tip page link stopped working, so we made a new one. Printed QR codes still point to the old link — please reprint them.
home.reprint.title: Your tip page link changed
home.setup.body: Add Stripe, Revolut, MobilePay or Monzo and you get a QR fans can scan.
home.setup.hint: Your other profiles are one tap away, above.
home.setup.title: This profile has no payment method yet
home.unfinished.body: Your last set started {when}{summary}. Starting a new one discards it for good.
home.unfinished.title: Unfinished session found
language.title: Language
live.leave_body: The session keeps collecting in the background — you can return from the home screen.
live.relay_down_banner: Can't reach live.tips — fans can still pay, tips won't show here until reconnected. Retrying…
live.stop_confirm_body: The session is saved to history with all its stats.
live.tip_page_offline_stripe: Tip page offline — card tips still tracked
live.tip_page_unauthorized: Tip page disconnected — create a new link in Settings
onboarding.account_name.explain_profiles: This names your whole account — it shows on every device you sign in on. Your profiles keep their own names.
onboarding.account_name.heading: What should we call you?
onboarding.account_name.label: Account name
onboarding.account_name.skip_hint: Leave it empty to skip — you can name the account later in Settings.
onboarding.account_name.title: Account name
onboarding.account_step.guest_subtitle: A private cloud account — you can attach Apple or Google to it later.
onboarding.account_step.heading: First, an account
onboarding.account_step.subtitle_profile: Sign in and your profiles, links and history can follow you to your other devices.
onboarding.account_step.title: Your account
onboarding.connect.create_key_subtitle: Two minutes, once. The key can create your tip link and watch the payments come in — nothing else.
onboarding.connect.key_empty: Paste your restricted API key first.
onboarding.connect.key_publishable: That's a *publishable* key. You need the restricted key (starts with rk_) — see the guide.
onboarding.connect.key_secret: That's your full live secret key — too powerful to put on a device. Create a *restricted* key (rk_live_…) instead; it takes two minutes and can only do what this app needs.
onboarding.connect.key_unrecognized: This doesn't look like a Stripe restricted key (expected rk_live_… or rk_test_…).
onboarding.connect.paste_help: Stored in this device's keychain. Only ever talks to api.stripe.com.
onboarding.connect.permissions_caveat: Everything else stays “None” — no payouts, refunds or balance access. Full live keys are refused.
onboarding.connect.permissions_missing: Some permissions are missing. Edit the key in Stripe, then verify again.
onboarding.connect.step1: Open the pre-filled form in your Stripe dashboard
onboarding.connect.step3: Copy it and paste it below
onboarding.connect.title: Connect Stripe
onboarding.details.heading: Let's set up your tip jar
onboarding.details.name_help: Fans see this on your tip page, the stage and posters.
onboarding.details.name_required: Add your artist or band name — fans will see it.
onboarding.details.subtitle: Tell us who you are and how you want to be paid. You can change all of this later in Settings.
onboarding.details.thanks_default: Thank you for supporting live music! 🎶
onboarding.details.thanks_help: Shown after a Stripe tip and on your tip page.
onboarding.details.title: Your details
onboarding.device_kind.demo_body: Play with simulated tips. No account, nothing real.
onboarding.device_kind.heading: What is this device?
onboarding.device_kind.performer_body: Your phone, tablet or laptop. Your accounts and profiles live here.
onboarding.device_kind.subtitle: This shapes how accounts live here. You can change it later in Settings — changing it wipes the device.
onboarding.device_kind.title: This device
onboarding.device_kind.venue_body: A tablet that stays at the venue. Artists sign in from their own phones; sessions end after 12 hours.
onboarding.device_kind.venue_unavailable: Not available on this platform — venue mode needs cloud accounts.
onboarding.done.relay_failed_body: Try again now, or finish it later from Settings — your payment details are saved.
onboarding.done.relay_failed_stripe_note: Your Stripe QR below already works.
onboarding.done.subtitle_connected: One QR for every way you take tips. Print it, tape it to your case, put it on the merch table.
onboarding.done.subtitle_no_method: You didn't add a payment method yet. Add one anytime from Settings, then share your QR.
onboarding.done.subtitle_relay_failed: We couldn't reach live.tips to build the page fans scan. Nothing you entered was lost.
onboarding.done.subtitle_stripe: Print it, tape it to your case, put it on the merch table — anyone can tip you in seconds.
onboarding.install_hint.browser_chrome_w: In the browser the address bar and toolbars stay on screen and moving around the app feels less smooth.
onboarding.install_hint.continue_message:
{first}

Your session history is saved on this device only — there’s no server — and an app added later can start from a separate store, so sessions you collect in the browser first may not carry over. Adding it now keeps everything in one place.
onboarding.install_hint.later_hint: You can always do this later.
onboarding.install_hint.no_fullscreen_wa: Without live.tips on your Home Screen, the stage can’t go full-screen — the browser’s bars stay on screen and moving around the app feels less smooth.
onboarding.install_hint.subtitle_apple: Safari can’t show live.tips full-screen on iPhone or iPad. Add it to your Home Screen and it launches edge-to-edge, with no browser bars — the clean stage your audience should see. Takes a few seconds.
onboarding.install_hint.subtitle_generic: Add live.tips to your Home Screen and it launches like an app — full-screen, no browser bars, and one tap away when you’re ready to go live. Takes a few seconds.
onboarding.install_hint.title: Add live.tips to your Home Screen
onboarding.key_guide.shortcut: Shortcut: the pre-filled form selects everything for you — review and click “Create key”.
onboarding.key_guide.step1_body: On a laptop is easiest — dashboard.stripe.com, the account that should receive the tips.
onboarding.key_guide.step1_title: Sign in to your Stripe dashboard
onboarding.key_guide.step3_body: “Create restricted key” → “Providing this key to a third-party application” → name it live.tips → “Customize permissions”.
onboarding.key_guide.step5_body: Starts with rk_live_ (or rk_test_ in a sandbox). AirDrop or a password manager gets it to the tablet safely. Rehearse with test card 4242 4242 4242 4242.
onboarding.key_guide.step6_body: The key lives in this device's secure keychain and is only ever sent to api.stripe.com. Revoke it any time in the dashboard — the app simply stops working until you connect a new one.
onboarding.key_guide.title: Create the key
onboarding.method.intro_mobilepay: Fans who pick MobilePay on your tip page are sent to your Box.
onboarding.method.intro_monzo: Fans who pick Monzo on your tip page are sent to your Monzo.me link.
onboarding.method.intro_revolut: Fans who pick Revolut on your tip page are sent to your @username.
onboarding.method.mobilepay_help: In MobilePay: open your Box → Share → paste the whole link or just the code. MobilePay Boxes are EUR only.
onboarding.method.mobilepay_invalid: That doesn't look like a Box link or id — paste the share link from MobilePay.
onboarding.method.monzo_help: In Monzo: tap the Monzo.me banner on your home screen → Share → paste the whole link or just your username. Monzo.me is GBP only.
onboarding.method.monzo_invalid: That doesn't look like a Monzo.me link or username — paste the share link from Monzo.
onboarding.method.revolut_help: In the Revolut app: tap your profile → your @username is under your name.
onboarding.method.revolut_invalid: That doesn't look like a Revolut username.
onboarding.method_select.heading: How do you want to get tipped?
onboarding.method_select.mobilepay_subti: Fans pay into your MobilePay Box. Unverified — see the note below.
onboarding.method_select.monzo_subtitle: Fans pay you on Monzo.me. Unverified — see the note below.
onboarding.method_select.relay_bullet_hi: Your history stays on this device either way — live.tips stores nothing.
onboarding.method_select.relay_bullet_se: Your QR points to a page on live.tips and tips reach your screen through the live.tips server. Stripe-only setups talk to no server at all.
onboarding.method_select.relay_bullet_un: Tips can't be verified. A tip shows up the moment a fan submits the form — whether or not they finish paying.
onboarding.method_select.relay_stripe_dr: Without Stripe there's no payment record anywhere except this device. We strongly recommend keeping Stripe — it's also the only method every fan can use.
onboarding.method_select.relay_warning_t: Before you add Revolut, MobilePay or Monzo
onboarding.method_select.revolut_subtitl: Fans pay you in the Revolut app. Unverified — see the note below.
onboarding.method_select.stripe_subtitle: Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay — verified payments straight to your own Stripe account.
onboarding.method_select.subtitle: Pick everything you use — fans get one QR either way.
onboarding.method_select.title: Get tipped
onboarding.relay_setup.regenerate_body: This replaces your tip page link. Printed QR codes with the old link stop working.
poster.customize_help: Write these in any language you like. Leave a field blank to use the default wording.
poster.title: Poster
poster.viewport_hint: Scroll or pinch to zoom · drag to move
settings.account.forget_body: This guest account can't be signed into again — its profiles, tip pages and history are lost for good. Nothing else on this device is touched.
settings.account.rename_explain: This names your whole cloud account — it shows on every device you sign in on. Your profiles keep their own names.
settings.account.session_alive: Signed in on this device — one tap to switch
settings.account.session_gone: Session ended — selecting it signs in again
settings.account.sign_in_subtitle_profil: Take your profiles to every device
settings.account.sign_out_anonymous_body: A guest account has no password and no provider to sign back in with: signing out destroys it, and its profiles, tip pages and history go with it. Link Apple or Google instead and you keep everything.
settings.account.sign_out_anonymous_warn: This is a guest account — signing out permanently loses access to it.
settings.account.sign_out_body_profiles: Your profiles stay on this device. Sign back in anytime to pick the account up again.
settings.account.switch_intro: The accounts this device knows. Each one carries its own profiles — switching accounts swaps all of them at once.
settings.account.switch_subtitle: Use another cloud account on this device
settings.account_details.currency_warnin: Changing the currency creates a new Stripe link — the old Stripe-only QR stops working.
settings.account_details.error_name_requ: Add your artist or band name — fans will see it.
settings.account_details.intro: The name, currency and thank-you message you set at sign-up. Changes sync to your Stripe link and your tip page.
settings.account_details.name_help: Fans see this on your tip page, the stage and posters.
settings.account_details.replace_link_bo: Stripe can't change a link's currency, so switching it creates a new payment link. Printed QR codes with the old Stripe-only link stop working. Your tip page QR is unaffected.
settings.account_details.thanks_help: Shown after a Stripe tip and on your tip page.
settings.add_device.claimed_body: {name} ({platform}) scanned your code and is waiting to be let in. Only confirm if that device is in front of you right now — a photo of this screen is enough for a stranger to ask.
settings.add_device.claimed_risk: If you confirm, your account — including your Stripe key — lives on that device for its session. Anyone holding it can use your tip setup. On a shared or venue device the session ends after 12 hours, but only approve hardware you can see, and know that live.tips is not responsible for a device you do not own.
settings.add_device.claimed_unverified: The device named itself — we cannot verify it.
settings.add_device.denied: Denied. That code is dead — make a new one if you change your mind.
settings.add_device.error_anonymous: Guest accounts can't add devices — link Apple or Google first, so there's a way back in.
settings.add_device.error_generic: Couldn't create a code. Check your connection and try again.
settings.add_device.error_signed_out: You're signed out. Sign in again to add a device.
settings.add_device.error_too_many: Too many codes open at once. Wait a minute, then try again.
settings.add_device.expired: This code expired. Codes are short-lived on purpose — make a fresh one.
settings.add_device.finishing: Confirmed. Finishing on the other device…
settings.add_device.intro: On the other device, open live.tips and scan this code. It works once, and only for two minutes.
settings.add_device.success_body: {name} picked up its sign-in and is finishing up on its side. It should appear in your device list in a moment.
settings.add_device.title: Add a device
settings.device_kind.change_body: Changing what this device is erases it completely: every account is signed out, every profile and its history on this device is deleted, and every cached key is removed. Cloud accounts keep their data in the cloud; local profiles are gone for good. The device returns to setup.
settings.device_kind.row_subtitle: Change what this device is — this wipes it
settings.main.footer_tagline: live.tips · open source — your keys, your money
settings.main.remove_profile_body_relay: Removes this profile's live.tips page and local data from this device. This action can't be undone.
settings.main.remove_profile_body_stripe: Removes the API key and this profile's local data. This action can't be undone.
settings.main.remove_profile_row: Remove this profile from this device
settings.main.stop_session_remove_profil: Stop the live session before removing a profile.
settings.main.switch_profile_subtitle: Work with another profile on this device
settings.main.title: Settings
settings.profile_details.title: Profile details
settings.relay_method.disconnect_body: This is your last tip-page method, so clearing it disconnects your tip page. Its QR stops working immediately. Tips history stays on this device.
settings.relay_method.error_mobilepay_in: That doesn't look like a Box link or id — paste the share link from MobilePay.
settings.relay_method.error_monzo_invali: That doesn't look like a Monzo.me link or username — paste the share link from Monzo.
settings.relay_method.error_revolut_inva: That doesn't look like a Revolut username.
settings.relay_method.help_mobilepay: In MobilePay: open your Box → Share → paste the whole link or just the code. MobilePay Boxes are EUR only.
settings.relay_method.help_monzo: In Monzo: tap the Monzo.me banner on your home screen → Share → paste the whole link or just your username. Monzo.me is GBP only.
settings.relay_method.help_revolut: In the Revolut app: tap your profile → your @username is under your name.
settings.relay_method.intro_mobilepay: Fans who pick MobilePay on your tip page are sent to your Box.
settings.relay_method.intro_monzo: Fans who pick Monzo on your tip page are sent to your Monzo.me link.
settings.relay_method.intro_revolut: Fans who pick Revolut on your tip page are sent to your @username.
settings.scan_device.camera_unavailable: The camera isn't available. Type the code instead.
settings.scan_device.error_expired: That code expired or was already used. Ask the other device for a fresh one.
settings.scan_device.error_invalid: This device didn't give a usable name. Try again.
settings.scan_device.error_network: No connection. Check the network and try again.
settings.scan_device.error_not_found: That isn't a live.tips add-device code.
settings.scan_device.error_rate: Too many attempts from this network. Try again later.
settings.scan_device.intro: Point the camera at the QR code on your signed-in device.
settings.scan_device.manual_intro: No camera here. Type or paste the code from your signed-in device.
settings.scan_device.title: Sign in with a QR
settings.scan_device.waiting_body: Tap "Sign it in" on your other device to finish. This code is useless until you do.
settings.security.intro: Every device signed into this account. Tips, keys and history sync to all of them — so an old phone in a drawer is worth taking off the list.
settings.security.reauth_failed: Sessions ended, but signing this device back in failed. Sign in again to continue.
settings.security.revoke_body: This asks that device to sign out and forget your keys — it obeys the next time it's online. For a device you no longer trust, use "Sign out everywhere else" instead: that one ends the session for real.
settings.security.revoke_sent: That device was asked to sign out.
settings.security.revoked_notice: This device was signed out of your account.
settings.security.row_subtitle: Devices, add a device, sign out everywhere
settings.security.sign_out_others_anonym: Link Apple or Google first. A guest account has no way to sign back in, so this would lock you out of your own account.
settings.security.sign_out_others_body: Every other device is signed out and loses its cached keys. This device stays signed in — you may be asked to confirm with Apple or Google.
settings.security.sign_out_others_failed: Couldn't sign the other devices out.
settings.security.sign_out_others_subtit: Ends every other session for real — they cannot renew and lose their cached keys. This device stays signed in (you'll be asked to authenticate once more).
settings.security.sign_out_self_body: This is the device in your hand. It signs out of the account here and keeps nothing — your other devices are untouched.
settings.security.signed_out: Sign in to see the devices on your account.
settings.security.title: Security
settings.stage.notes_subtitle: Mix folded notes into the coin pile
settings.stage.preview_subtitle: Pour pretend tips — no session needed
settings.stage.quality_subtitle: Auto drops effects if the device can't hold a smooth frame rate
settings.stage.style_webview_note: Jar styles need a WebView — this platform shows the classic screen instead.
settings.stage.vessel_picker_title: Vessel — any size fills toward your goal
settings.stage_preview.sheet_subtitle: Exactly what your fans fill in — see how it lands on stage.
settings.stripe_key.create_key_subtitle: Two minutes, once. The key can create your tip link and watch the payments come in — nothing else.
settings.stripe_key.disconnect_body: Removes the Stripe key and tip link from this account on this device. Your Stripe account and its payments stay in Stripe — you can reconnect a key any time.
settings.stripe_key.error_empty: Paste your restricted API key first.
settings.stripe_key.error_format: This doesn't look like a Stripe restricted key (expected rk_live_… or rk_test_…).
settings.stripe_key.error_permissions: Some permissions are missing. Edit the key in Stripe, then verify again.
settings.stripe_key.error_publishable: That's a *publishable* key. You need the restricted key (starts with rk_).
settings.stripe_key.error_secret: That's your full live secret key — too powerful to put on a device. Create a *restricted* key (rk_live_…) instead.
settings.stripe_key.intro_connected: Card tips settle straight to your Stripe account. Paste a new key to move accounts or rotate the key.
settings.stripe_key.intro_new: Card tips settle straight to your Stripe account. Your name, currency and thank-you message come from Account details — just paste your restricted key.
settings.stripe_key.key_row_subtitle: The restricted key on this device
settings.stripe_key.permissions_caveat: Everything else stays “None” — no payouts, refunds or balance access. Full live keys are refused.
settings.stripe_key.replace_warning: Replacing the key creates a fresh tip link. Printed QR codes with the old Stripe link stop working.
settings.stripe_key.replaced_snack: Stripe key replaced — new tip link created
settings.stripe_key.step1: Open the pre-filled form in your Stripe dashboard
settings.stripe_key.step3: Copy it and paste it below
settings.stripe_key.storage_note: Stored in this device's keychain. Only ever talks to api.stripe.com.
settings.stripe_key.title: Stripe
setup.cancel_body: The API key you just connected is removed from this device. Nothing else changes — you can reconnect it any time.
setup.error_name_required: Give your tip jar a name — fans will see it.
setup.error_permission:
{message}

Add the missing permission to your key in the Stripe dashboard, then try again.
setup.intro: This creates a tip link in your Stripe account. Fans choose their own amount and can leave a name and a message.
setup.name_help: Fans see this on the payment page and the stage.
setup.recreate_warning: This replaces your current link — the old link and any printed QR codes will stop working. Edit the details below, then create the new one.
setup.success_body: Print the QR, tape it to your case, put it on the merch table — anyone can tip you in seconds.
setup.thanks_default: Thank you for supporting live music! 🎶
stage.fullscreen_iphone_body: iPhone Safari can’t expand a web page to fullscreen. Add live.tips to your Home Screen once and it launches with no browser bars — a clean, full-screen stage.
stage.waiting_first_tip_qr:
Waiting for the first tip…
the QR code is doing its thing
stage.web_unavailable: The jar stage is unavailable here — showing the classic screen instead.
venue.banner.confirm_end: End the session and remove {name} from this device?
venue.banner.label: Public device · signed in as {name}
venue.boot.choose_failed: This device's secure storage didn't answer, and a shared device can't be set up without it. Unlock or restart the device, then try again.
venue.boot.erase_body: Everything stored on this device will be deleted: profiles, histories, cached keys. Accounts keep their data in the cloud. The device returns to setup.
venue.boot.locked_body: This is a shared venue device, so everything it stores is encrypted with a key kept in the device's secure storage — and that storage didn't answer just now. Nothing was changed. Unlock the device (or restart it), then try again.
venue.boot.restore_body: There is encrypted venue data on this device, but the key that unlocks it is missing from the device's secure storage. That is usually a backup restored onto different hardware — the key never leaves the original device, so this data can't be read here. Nothing was changed or deleted. If a restore just happened, restoring the device's keychain too brings the key back. Otherwise the only way forward is to erase and set up again.
venue.boot.restore_title: This device's data can't be unlocked
venue.code_entry.camera_unavailable: The camera is not available. Type the code below instead.
venue.code_entry.error_expired: The code expired before it was confirmed. Make a fresh one on your phone.
venue.code_entry.error_generic: Something went wrong. Make a fresh code on your phone and try again.
venue.code_entry.error_invalid: That doesn't look like a live.tips code. Check the code under the QR on your phone.
venue.code_entry.error_network: Couldn't reach live.tips. Check this device's connection.
venue.code_entry.error_not_found: Unknown code. It may have expired — codes work once, for two minutes.
venue.code_entry.error_rate: Too many attempts from this device. Wait a bit and try again.
venue.code_entry.waiting_body: Your phone is asking whether to let this device in. Nothing happens here until you confirm there.
venue.identity.check_body: Check the name. If this isn't you, someone else's code was approved — sign out now and nothing of theirs stays here.
venue.identity.signed_in_as: This device just signed in as
venue.intro.heading: How a shared device works
venue.intro.point_ceiling: A session ends by itself after 12 hours. A restart cannot extend it.
venue.intro.point_leave: Ending a session signs the account out and wipes its cached keys from this device — nothing stays behind.
venue.intro.point_phone: Artists sign in from their own phones — the phone shows a code, this device takes it. No passwords, no Google popups on shared hardware.
venue.intro.title: Shared device
venue.intro.warning: Anyone holding this device while a session runs can use the signed-in account's tip setup. Artists are told this before they approve.
venue.reapprove.body: This is a shared device, so changing profiles needs a fresh approval from your own phone: open live.tips there, go to Settings → Security → Add device, and scan or type the new code here.
venue.reapprove.title: Approval needed
venue.reapprove.wrong_account: That approval came from a different account than the one on this device. Nothing was changed. Approve from the account that is signed in here.
venue.sign_in.how_body: Open live.tips, go to Settings → Security → Add device, and scan the QR below with this device — or type the code shown under it.
venue.sign_in.subtitle: This device belongs to the venue. Sign in from your own phone — no password ever gets typed here.
venue.sign_in.title: Shared device
welcome.feature_jar_body: Watch your 3D jar fill toward tonight's goal, tip by tip.
welcome.feature_qr_body: Fans scan, pick an amount, leave a name and a message.
welcome.feature_stripe_body: No middleman, no platform cut — tips land in your own account.
welcome.trust: Open source · your key never leaves this device
widgets.account_switcher.anonymous_locke: Signed out — a guest account can't be signed back into
widgets.install_steps.android_install: Choose “Install app” or “Add to Home screen”.
widgets.install_steps.android_menu: Tap the ⋮ menu in your browser’s toolbar.
widgets.install_steps.ios_add: Scroll down and choose “Add to Home Screen”.
widgets.install_steps.ios_share: Tap the Share button in Safari’s toolbar.
widgets.install_steps.open_fullscreen: Open live.tips from your Home Screen — full-screen.
widgets.method_badges.in_person_tooltip: Tapped on your card reader or phone — Stripe confirmed the payment. In-person tips carry no name or message.
widgets.method_badges.unverified_tooltip: Sent from your tip page — live.tips can't confirm the payment completed.
widgets.profile_switcher.add_failed: Couldn't add a profile right now — try again.
widgets.profile_switcher.add_subtitle: Another profile with its own links, goal and history.
widgets.profile_switcher.discard_body: You started this profile but didn't add a payment method, so there's nothing to keep. Switching away deletes it.
widgets.profile_switcher.live_running_hi: A live session is running — stop it to switch profiles.
widgets.profile_switcher.stop_session_ad: Stop the live session before adding a profile.
widgets.profile_switcher.stop_session_sw: Stop the live session before switching profiles.
widgets.profile_switcher.title: Your profiles
widgets.tip_tile.external_tooltip: Received outside live.tips — not through your tip link.
